summary.authoritative_rule: a narrow 5min collapse-override prototype should catch retained override positives and reversal watches while staying off clean controls

interpretation: V1.31S formalizes the first narrow commercial-aerospace 5-minute collapse-override prototype using only the locally available retained supervision set.
The prototype is intentionally governance-bound: it is designed to classify obvious intraday collapses, not to rewrite the lawful EOD primary.
